## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly catch-up to discuss ongoing projects, updates, and address team questions before Vivek's two-week absence.](https://fathom.video/share/so8xBZsWkJn5FVszKDwFs7qeEmJyZbPv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Airtable must be kept up-to-date to avoid reporting issues; statuses should be moved promptly](https://fathom.video/share/so8xBZsWkJn5FVszKDwFs7qeEmJyZbPv?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Galileo blog migration fix will be delegated to Suleiman and his freelancer to complete \~35 remaining articles](https://fathom.video/share/so8xBZsWkJn5FVszKDwFs7qeEmJyZbPv?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Rapid AI may provide new ICP personas; current content strategy remains focused on general audience](https://fathom.video/share/so8xBZsWkJn5FVszKDwFs7qeEmJyZbPv?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [Vivek provided updates on various projects (Strapi, Galileo, Rapid) and addressed team questions](https://fathom.video/share/so8xBZsWkJn5FVszKDwFs7qeEmJyZbPv?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)

## Topics

### Airtable and Strapi Updates

  - [Emphasis on keeping Airtable updated for accurate reporting](https://fathom.video/share/so8xBZsWkJn5FVszKDwFs7qeEmJyZbPv?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Strapi articles should be moved to "Add" stage when ready](https://fathom.video/share/so8xBZsWkJn5FVszKDwFs7qeEmJyZbPv?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Engineering requests need consistent follow-ups](https://fathom.video/share/so8xBZsWkJn5FVszKDwFs7qeEmJyZbPv?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)

### Looker Stability and Contingency Plans

  - [New Lookers are more stable; date range issues unlikely](https://fathom.video/share/so8xBZsWkJn5FVszKDwFs7qeEmJyZbPv?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [If problems occur, reduce date range or consult Suleiman for fixes](https://fathom.video/share/so8xBZsWkJn5FVszKDwFs7qeEmJyZbPv?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [GSC screenshots as a last resort for one week](https://fathom.video/share/so8xBZsWkJn5FVszKDwFs7qeEmJyZbPv?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)

### Galileo Blog Migration

  - [35 out of 70 blogs still need fixing after Sanity to Framer migration](https://fathom.video/share/so8xBZsWkJn5FVszKDwFs7qeEmJyZbPv?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Process is tedious, taking 10-15 minutes per article](https://fathom.video/share/so8xBZsWkJn5FVszKDwFs7qeEmJyZbPv?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Task to be delegated to Suleiman and his freelancer](https://fathom.video/share/so8xBZsWkJn5FVszKDwFs7qeEmJyZbPv?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Mara to inform Jackson about extended timeline](https://fathom.video/share/so8xBZsWkJn5FVszKDwFs7qeEmJyZbPv?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)

### Rapid AI Content Strategy

  - [Current focus remains on general payment ops audience](https://fathom.video/share/so8xBZsWkJn5FVszKDwFs7qeEmJyZbPv?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
  - [Specific audiences (e.g., merchants, high-risk industries) determined by article content](https://fathom.video/share/so8xBZsWkJn5FVszKDwFs7qeEmJyZbPv?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Potential inclusion of more technical details (code) to be discussed after SOW review](https://fathom.video/share/so8xBZsWkJn5FVszKDwFs7qeEmJyZbPv?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)

### Upcoming Content Updates

  - [Pillar page refreshes scheduled for next week](https://fathom.video/share/so8xBZsWkJn5FVszKDwFs7qeEmJyZbPv?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)
  - [Model pages may start the following week, pending client feedback](https://fathom.video/share/so8xBZsWkJn5FVszKDwFs7qeEmJyZbPv?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
